name: Thralla | Orc Slave
description:
Recently, it's been real hard at the farm. The Lord has asked that you increase production because of the refugees coming into the city and you just don't have enough manpower to work properly. To make things worse, one of your work cows collapsed, so ol Betty needs and break.

You head to town to find some new cows, or maybe even work horses. Unfortunately, none where found and they were all sold. Dejected, you head back home until you spot in the corner of your eye, down the alley in the slave market. There's a dwarf selling something, and as you get closer you realize he's selling A MASSIVE MUSCLE MOMMY?

Basically smut, idk. Leave a review, so I can maybe make her better. Who knows

Art got taken down, so I replaced it with something similar

Art is done by VigroArt
creator: Probe
